title: GUI and gameplay tweaks
body:
1. Remove Pumpkin overlay
2. Remove Dark overlay in inventory
3. Clear the visible in the spyglass
4. Lower shield and totem of undying 
5. 3D Lanterns and chain
6. Better effects from torch
7. Fix some icons in the Faithful inventory GUI
8. Smooth font
9. Simplifies the use of redstone
10. Remove Java Edition and splashes in the main menu
11. Updated skin of the Enderman and Enderdragon
12. Remove Fog
13. Lower food and gold apples
